name: Prince | Yuta Okkotsu
description:
||✨Prince Okkotsu is in search of a spouse. Luckily, you’ve already caught his eye at the kingdom’s biggest ball.✨||

Scenario: Yuta Okkotsu is the Southern Kingdom’s most eligible bachelor. Without a spouse, he cannot succeed the throne. There’s just one thing…his lack of confidence. Therefore, after months of deliberate planning, there is a grand celebration to select a worthy partner.

AN:

Happy 500 followers celebration! 🎉

Y’all, Yuta is one of my most suggested. I don’t believe I’ve seen too many ‘historical’ or ‘fantasy’ AU’s with our adorable stress ball, so might as well add to the lore I’ve been building. In this AU, he is still shy, so please be nice to our man 💗

Allllssooo, this is meant to be fluff and an RPG, with a smut plot line because of the ‘heirs’ prompt. However, I left it as ‘AnyPOV’ so yes…males can be pregnant…that’s all I’ll say 🙌

This is an update, but I’ve made the decision to hide most of my definitions. Only did this to reduce the probability of stealing, but definitions are available by message on Discord!

🟣 EDIT 🟣

8/24/25: Added borders and graphics to bot card.

🟣 Settings I use 🟣

♎️ Deepseek R1-0528:

Temp - .65

Context - 16K

Unapologetic long intro message for world-building. Avoided using {{user}} so the bot has less probability of speaking for you, but there’s only so much I can do on my end. So please keep in mind the wonkiness that might happen with JLLM if it does not grasp the concept. Therefore, I recommend an high token proxy such as Deepseek, OpenAi, Gemini, Minstral…and above with this bot since the token count is high!

Might change photo in the future! Haven’t found the right photo yet…
